headline: Nilla Wafers to Release Special-Edition Cookie with Grogu Nilla Nummies
summary: Calling all Star Wars™ fans across the galaxy: Nilla Wafers is releasing your new favorite cookie! Nilla is collaborating with Lucasfilm to introduce the special-edition Grogu Nilla Nummies, inspired by Grogu's™ unforgettable love of cookies.
